feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L115B06 maintenance notification

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 22, 07:00 - 08:00 UTC

Jun 23, 17:43 UTC

Start time : 22/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, servers in the rack L115B06 will be temporarily unavailable.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YYZ][Dedicated Servers] - Room YYZ0101 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 12:30 - 13:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC

- G107A06

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Cooling System] - Rack T01C49 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 11:00 - 19:30 UTC

Jun 27, 03:09 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 02/07/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 02/07/2026 19:30 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G127A19 incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 30, 23:03 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 30/06/2026 22:38 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 23:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 30, 22:46 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the specified rack.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 30/06/2026 22:38 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : vRack network is temporarily unavailable in the specified rack.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through vRack network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Infrastructure] - Rack G263B14 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Jun 30, 14:55 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 30, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in Rack G263B14.

Start time : 30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS1][Cooling System] - Rack T01C51 maintenance notification
entry.content:

Jun 30, 11:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 27, 03:08 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 30/06/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 19:30 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX3][Dedicated Servers] - Racks 41F02 41G06 41G07 41H05 41H06 incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 30, 11:29 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/06/2026 11:15 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 11:17 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified racks 41F02 41G06 41G07 41H05 41H06 were no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [LIM][Storage and Backups] - Enterprise File Storage maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 30, 08:22 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our Storage and Backups is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

Jun 30, 05:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 15, 15:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Storage and Backups offer.

Start time : 30/06/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : Some Storage Enterprise File Storage services used with vRack Services will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 1 minute during the maintenance period.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Storage infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
